title: Hydrologists
description: Research the distribution, circulation, and physical properties of underground and surface waters; and study the form and intensity of precipitation and its rate of infiltration into the soil, movement through the earth, and return to the ocean and atmosphere.

tasks.text: Prepare written and oral reports describing research results, using illustrations, maps, appendices, and other information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design and conduct scientific hydrogeological investigations to ensure that accurate and appropriate information is available for use in water resource management decisions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Measure and graph phenomena such as lake levels, stream flows, and changes in water volumes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct research and communicate information to promote the conservation and preservation of water resources.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate and supervise the work of professional and technical staff, including research assistants, technologists, and technicians.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study public water supply issues, including flood and drought risks, water quality, wastewater, and impacts on wetland habitats.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply research findings to help minimize the environmental impacts of pollution, waterborne diseases, erosion, and sedimentation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study and document quantities, distribution, disposition, and development of underground and surface waters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Install, maintain, and calibrate instruments such as those that monitor water levels, rainfall, and sediments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop computer models for hydrologic predictions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study and analyze the physical aspects of the earth in terms of hydrological components, including atmosphere, hydrosphere, and interior structure.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate research data in terms of its impact on issues such as soil and water conservation, flood control planning, and water supply forecasting.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect and analyze water samples as part of field investigations or to validate data from automatic monitors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare hydrogeologic evaluations of known or suspected hazardous waste sites and land treatment and feedlot facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate data and provide recommendations regarding the feasibility of municipal projects, such as hydroelectric power plants, irrigation systems, flood warning systems, and waste treatment facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or modify methods for conducting hydrologic studies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review applications for site plans and permits and recommend approval, denial, modification, or further investigative action.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor the work of well contractors, exploratory borers, and engineers and enforce rules regarding their activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Answer questions and provide technical assistance and information to contractors or the public regarding issues such as well drilling, code requirements, hydrology, and geology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate properties, origins, and activities of glaciers, ice, snow, and permafrost.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct short- and long-term climate assessments and study storm occurrences.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Administer programs designed to ensure the proper sealing of abandoned wells.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate complaints or conflicts related to the alteration of public waters, gathering information, recommending alternatives, informing participants of progress, and preparing draft orders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design civil works associated with hydrographic activities and supervise their construction, installation, and maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile and evaluate hydrologic information to prepare navigational charts and maps and to predict atmospheric conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
